description_long: This is a modern, compact chaise with a minimalist design, upholstered in a smooth, light gray fabric. The seat is wide and flat, with two large, rectangular back cushions that provide support and comfort. The backrest is straight and moderately high, with a clean, unembellished surface, and the base sits on four short, cylindrical wooden legs. The rear of the chaise is finished in a darker material, likely fabric or vinyl, contrasting with the lighter front and sides. The overall silhouette is boxy and geometric, with no visible armrests, making it suitable for urban parks, lobbies, or public waiting areas. The upholstery appears soft and inviting, with subtle tufting on the cushions for added texture.
description: A modern, light gray chaise with a straight backrest, two large back cushions, and short wooden legs. The design is minimalist and boxy, with no armrests and subtle tufting on the cushions.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide seat, two large back cushions, and the straight, clean-lined backrest.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness of the seat and backrest, as well as the short, cylindrical legs.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the dark-colored back panel and the simple, unadorned structure of the chaise.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the profile of the seat and backrest with visible cushion depth.
attribute_backrest_design: The backrest is straight, moderately high, and features a clean, minimalist design with no visible decorative elements. It is paired with two large, rectangular cushions that add comfort and a subtle touch of tufting.
attribute_armrest_presence: No armrests are present on either side of the chaise.
attribute_leg_style: The legs are short, cylindrical, and made of wood with a natural finish, positioned at each corner for stability and a modern look.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: The upholstery is solid light gray fabric with a smooth texture and subtle tufting on the back cushions, giving it a slightly quilted appearance.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: There are two large, loose back cushions placed side by side against the backrest, with the seat cushion being a single, wide, attached piece. The arrangement is simple and symmetrical.
